faq.question: Can I convert a multi-page PDF into JPG images?
faq.answer: Yes. Each PDF page is converted into its own JPG image so it is easy to view, share, or save individually.

faq.question: Is the converter free to use?
faq.answer: Yes. The PDF to JPG tool is available online for free and works directly in your browser.

faq.question: Will the output quality be good enough for sharing?
faq.answer: Yes. The conversion produces clear JPG images that are suitable for email, web use, and quick sharing.

faq.question: What file formats are supported?
faq.answer: Upload a PDF file and receive JPG image output for the pages in your document.

faq.question: Can I use this for screenshots or document pages?
faq.answer: Yes. It is useful for turning document pages, scanned pages, and simple PDF content into JPG images for easier viewing.
